allowOverflow.description: Whether the panel may overflow the boundary while dragging.

closeOnEscape.description: Whether the floating panel closes when the escape key is pressed.

defaultOpen.description: The initial open state of the floating panel when uncontrolled.

defaultPosition.description: The initial position of the floating panel when uncontrolled.

defaultSize.description: The initial size of the floating panel when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the floating panel is disabled.

draggable.description: Whether the floating panel is draggable.

finalFocusEl.description: Element to receive focus when the floating panel closes.

getAnchorPosition.description: Function that returns the initial panel position when opened.

getBoundaryEl.description: Function that returns the boundary element for dragging and resizing.

gridSize.description: The snap grid for dragging and keyboard movement.

id.description: The unique identifier of the floating panel.

ids.type: Partial<{ trigger: string; positioner: string; content: string; title: string; header: string }>
ids.description: The ids of the floating panel elements. Useful for composition.

initialFocusEl.description: Element to receive focus when the floating panel opens.

lockAspectRatio.description: Whether resizing locks the panel to its aspect ratio.

maxSize.description: The maximum size of the floating panel.

minSize.description: The minimum size of the floating panel.

open.description: The controlled open state of the floating panel.

persistRect.description: Whether size and position should be preserved when the floating panel closes.

position.description: The controlled position of the floating panel.

positionChangeEnd.description: Emits details when a position-changing drag interaction ends.

positionDetailsChange.description: Emits details when the panel position changes via dragging or API calls.

resizable.description: Whether the floating panel is resizable.

restoreFocus.description: Whether focus should be restored when the floating panel closes.

size.description: The controlled size of the floating panel.

sizeChangeEnd.description: Emits details when a size-changing resize interaction ends.

sizeDetailsChange.description: Emits details when the panel size changes via resizing or API calls.

stageChange.description: Emits details when the panel stage changes.

value.description: The floating panel machine returned by useFloatingPanel().

axis.description: The axis of the resize handle.

stage.description: The stage to apply when the trigger is clicked.
